name: large white visitors room
description: I'm in a large white visitors room
items_start: Plate glass window with embeded red wires
hints: The window overlooks the control room below. There are buttons and a camera to deal with.
LOOK WINDOW to see what is below. The TV camera is monitoring the window area. You need to disable it.
You need to disable the TV camera before breaking the window. Show the saboteur's badge to deactivate it.
Disable the camera, then BREAK WINDOW to reach the ledge. PRESS WHITE to return through the white door. The window leads to a ledge (room 16) with a key.

needs: Picture of saboteur stamped -window maintance- (need access)
effects: Message: `Owner of badge is not present!`
Message: The door opens just long enough for me to scurry through.

Message: I'm on the 2nd floor. Below I see the control room surronding
the reactor core. There's a wide ledge just under the window.

needs: Picture of saboteur stamped -window maintance- (need access)

effects: Message: TV camera is slow scanning the window area.
Message: TV camera is powered down.

notes: Visitor room with a plate glass window overlooking the control room. The TV camera must be disabled before breaking the window. Breaking the window (with wire cutters to cut the alarm wires) gives access to the ledge (room 16). PRESS WHITE button returns to room 9.
